description.value: Trigger: A hostile creature you can see moves out of your melee reach Effect: Make one melee attack against the triggering creature. Movement within your reach doesn't trigger this reaction. Teleportation and forced movement don't trigger this reaction. The Disengage action prevents opportunity attacks.

system.trigger: A hostile creature you can see moves out of your melee reach
system.effect: Make one melee attack against the triggering creature. Movement within your reach doesn't trigger this reaction. Teleportation and forced movement don't trigger this reaction. The Disengage action prevents opportunity attacks.
